topic: 59 机器学习在水声数据分类识别中的应用
query_atoms_en: underwater acoustic event detection neural network
marine acoustic data deep learning benchmark

baseline_papers: Graph Neural Network using Temporal and Spectral Correlations for Underwater Acoustic Event Detection
Weak Underwater Acoustic Event Detection in Complex Marine Environments Using Deep Temporal Networks and Sea-Trial Validation
module_papers: Domain Generalization on Efficient Acoustic Scene Classification using Residual Normalization
reference_papers: Event detection of underwater acoustic data from MACHO hydrophone
Multi-Temporal Resolution Convolutional Neural Networks for Acoustic Scene Classification
Analysis Acoustic Features for Acoustic Scene Classification and Score fusion of multi-classification systems applied to DCASE 2016 challenge
Improved techniques for detection and localization of underwater acoustic sources using acoustic vector sensors

evidence_gaps: No canonical underwater acoustic dataset (ShipsEar / DeepShip / Ocean Networks Canada) present; dataset_candidates lacks a primary benchmark.
Module_papers (DCASE acoustic scene) are off-target-recognition task and dilute methodological focus.
comersy/marine-mammal-sound-classifier is a passive ecology task, not adjacent to target classification; removed from parallel_papers.
Baseline entries are SSRN preprints with null year; peer-reviewed IEEE/JASA venue needed for reproducible first-rung.
